---
title: 'Midnight'
date: '2014-08-26T05:08:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'It''s Author Fun'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '8669201573365454276'
blogger_filename: '/2014/08/midnight.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/It_s Author Fun/feed.atom'
---

<p dir=ltr>The pavement sings as it's pelted with wetness. The. Midnight song of a Fort Worth summer.</p>
